ag-cube-cm.description: ag-cube-cm tools: download AgERA5/CHIRPS weather, SoilGrids soil data, and run DSSAT/BANANA_N crop model simulations. Requires: pip install -e '.[mcp]' from the project root.

cdh.description: cdh tools: download CHIRPS precipitation, CHIRTS-ERA5 temperature, AgERA5 agrometeorological indicators, and NASA POWER data for any country or admin unit. Requires: pip install -e '.[full]' from the project root. AgERA5 also needs ~/.cdsapirc.
